Sound Familiar?
◆

You're the Expert. Marketing Shouldn't Be Your Second Job.

You built a business around your expertise — not around funnels, automations, and lead nurturing. But somewhere along the way, self-marketing became a full-time gig that pulls you away from the work you actually love.

The DIY Trap

You've watched the courses, bought the templates, stitched together 6 different tools — and your "system" still leaks leads. You're spending more time marketing than serving clients.

Cheap Freelancers Who Ghost

You hired someone cheap. They overpromised, built half a funnel, then disappeared. Now you're worse off than when you started — and you still don't understand how any of it works.

Agencies That Drain Budgets

The agency charged you $3K/month for "strategy calls" and a Canva template. Six months later, you have a pretty brand board and no revenue system.

Hi, I'm Sami Rae
◆

I Build the Systems Behind 7 & 8 Figure Brands

Hi, I'm Sami Rae. I've spent 15 years building the marketing systems behind 193+ #1 Amazon bestselling books — every single one hit the top spot. I didn't just write copy or "run ads." I built the full backend: the funnels, the email sequences, the CRM pipelines, the automations that turned readers into leads and leads into high-ticket clients.

Now I build those same revenue systems for coaches, consultants, and authors using GoHighLevel (GHL). You bring the expertise. I build the machine that monetizes it.

Strategy First

Every system starts with clarity and direction.

Systems That Scale

We build infrastructure that grows with you.

Results That Last

Sustained growth. Real results. Long-term impact.

★ Based in Austin, TX • US-Based, US Hours
The Process
◆

The Invisible System Behind Visible Results

Every engagement follows the same proven framework — whether you need a single funnel or a full revenue engine.

1

Diagnose

Strategy call. We identify your offer, audience, bottlenecks, and revenue goals.

2

Design

You get a clear system blueprint — steps, tools, and a customized plan with pricing.

3

Build

I set up the pages, automations, integrations, and lead flow. You stay focused on clients.

4

Launch

Everything goes live. I walk you through how it works so nothing feels like a black box.

5

Optimize

We review performance, tighten conversion points, and improve follow-up sequences.

Built in the background.
So you can focus on what you do best.

While you serve your clients, we build the systems that attract more of them, convert them with ease, and create results that compound.

Services
◆

Choose Your Starting Point

Every service includes done-for-you implementation. No templates. No guesswork.

Strategic Growth Blueprint
$200 – $500
Depends on business complexity and scope of the audit.
Not sure what's broken or where to start? I'll dig into your entire marketing presence — website, funnels, email, offers — and hand you a clear, prioritized plan with specific next steps.
  • Full marketing and business audit
  • Revenue opportunity analysis
  • AI integration roadmap
  • Prioritized 90-day action plan
  • Implementation options: DFY, DWY, or DIY
Best for: Business owners who need clarity before investing in buildout.
Delivered in 3–5 days
GoHighLevel (GHL) Funnel & Automation Setup
$500 – $1,500
Price varies by number of pages, email sequences, and integrations needed.
A complete, working GoHighLevel system — not just a landing page. I build your funnel, connect your CRM, and set up the automations so leads flow automatically.
  • Sales funnel or landing pages
  • Email nurture sequences (3–10 emails)
  • CRM pipeline with lead tagging
  • Appointment booking integration
  • SMS follow-up and workflow triggers
  • Walkthrough video included
Best for: Businesses that know what they need and want it implemented.
Delivered in 5–10 days
Book-to-Business Revenue System
$2,500 – $5,000
Scope depends on funnel complexity, number of sequences, and custom design work.
The full authority engine. I turn your book, course, or framework into an automated client acquisition system — from Amazon to your calendar.
  • Complete lead-to-client funnel
  • 5+ email nurture sequences
  • GHL CRM pipeline to paid offers
  • Ad strategy document
  • Upsell flows and booking automation
  • Post-launch optimization
Best for: Service providers who need a complete lead-to-client system.
Delivered in 2–3 weeks
Monthly Marketing Retainer
$1,500 – $3,000/mo
Based on hours, channels managed, and volume of campaigns per month.
I run your marketing systems month-to-month so you can focus on your business. Optimization, campaigns, automation management, and monthly strategy calls.
  • Ongoing funnel optimization and A/B testing
  • Monthly email campaigns
  • GHL CRM and automation management
  • Monthly strategy call with reporting
  • Priority response time (same-day)
Best for: Businesses that want ongoing optimization and growth support.
Month-to-month — cancel anytime

Not for businesses looking for hacks, fake urgency, or vanity metrics.
This is for owners who want a practical revenue system built properly.

FAQ
◆

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before we work together. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Let's talk.

What if I'm not sure which service I need?
+
That's exactly what the strategy call is for. We'll talk through where you are, where you want to go, and I'll recommend the right starting point. No pressure to buy anything on the call.
How long does a typical project take?
+
A Strategic Growth Blueprint takes 3–5 days. A funnel build takes 5–10 days. A full revenue system takes 2–3 weeks. Every project starts with a clear timeline so you know exactly what to expect.
Do I need a GoHighLevel account?
+
If we're building in GHL, yes — you'll need an active account. If you don't have one yet, I'll help you choose the right plan during our strategy call. I also build on WordPress and custom platforms if that's a better fit.
Do you write the copy or do I need to provide it?
+
I write all funnel copy, email sequences, and page content. If you have existing copy you love, I'll work with that. Either way, you approve everything before it goes live.
What if I'm not tech-savvy?
+
That's the whole point. I build the system, record a walkthrough video so you understand how it works, and make sure you're never stuck. You don't need to be technical — you just need to know your business.
Can you integrate with my existing tools?
+
Yes — Stripe, PayPal, Calendly, Kajabi, Teachable, Zapier, and most major platforms. If you're not sure whether your stack works, just ask on the strategy call.
What's your refund policy?
+
I scope every project before you pay so there are no surprises. If at any point during the build you feel it's not the right fit, we'll discuss it directly. Full details are in my Terms of Service.

Still have questions?
